text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Maybe I should pay more attention to that
stuff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, Biko told me earlier that my skin looked so
rough she mistook me for a kaiju...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I've never really thought much about my skin, but
if Biko thinks it's that bad, maybe I should take
better care of it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Self-conscious about the state of her rough skin,
Hishi Akebono seems somewhat stressed...
